conversation.content: Thanks for checking. Since June 26 isn’t available, please review the change policy and fees for BK-1000 so I know the exact cost.

For BK-1000, the applicable change policy is:

- Fare: Economy
- Route: International
- Reason: Personal
- Original departure: 2026-06-19
- Booked at: 2026-06-01

Because this is an international economy ticket and your departure is within 7 days, the change fee would be:

- Change fee: $200
- Plus any fare difference to the new flight you choose

Important note:
- Since you booked on 2026-06-01, the 48-hour free international change window has already passed.
- So the exact total cost cannot be finalized until a replacement flight is selected, because fare difference still applies.

So your total change cost would be:

- Exact cost = $200 + fare difference

If you want, I can next search nearby dates and help find the lowest-cost option to minimize that fare difference.

rules.free_change_window: Free changes within 24 hours (domestic) or 48 hours (international) of booking
rules.economy_domestic_personal: Domestic change fee: $75 if departure >7 days, $150 if ≤7 days. Fare difference also applies.
rules.economy_international_personal: International change fee: $100 if departure >7 days, $200 if ≤7 days. Fare difference also applies.
rules.economy_medical: Medical changes: 50% discount on standard fee (requires change_reason='medical')
rules.economy_bereavement: Bereavement changes: 75% discount on standard fee (requires change_reason='bereavement')
rules.schedule_change: Airline schedule changes: free, no fee (change_reason='schedule_change')
rules.route_type_matters: Fees differ by route type. Check flight route_type.

conversation.content: Understood. One correction: my loyalty tier is gold, not basic. Please double-check whether that changes the policy, and if not, I understand the cost would be $200 plus any fare difference.

I double-checked using Gold tier, and it does not change the flight change policy for this ticket.

For BK-1000, the policy remains:

- International economy
- Personal reason
- Departure within 7 days

So the applicable fee is still:

- $200 change fee
- Plus any fare difference for the new flight

So yes, your understanding is correct: $200 + any fare difference.
